narrative:
Kenston Local Sd (Geauga) school district has 14,767 registered voters, with 54.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 12.9 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -1.6% D−R vs -20.6% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
